name: Swarm of Ravens
description:
### Special Abilities
[{"name":"Swarm","desc":"The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny raven. The swarm can't regain hit points or gain temporary hit points."}]

### Actions
[{"name":"Beaks","desc":"Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target in the swarm's space. Hit: 7 (2d6) piercing damage, or 3 (1d6) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer.","attack_bonus":4,"damage":[{"damage_type":"piercing","damage_dice":"2d6"}]}]
